The '''''Home''''' was an old [[Tsukkian water freighter]] owned by the founding members of [[Reekeene's Roughnecks]]. It was later converted into a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Rookies: Rendezvous]]'' {{1st}}
*{{WEGCite|story=Tests of the Godking|book=Star Wars Campaign Pack|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
*{{WEGCite|story=The Plant|book=Star Wars Campaign Pack|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
*{{WEGCite|story=Lens Reekeene Is Missing|book=Star Wars Campaign Pack|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
